calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trust Documents
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Reid appeared by telephone for Daniel Dirusso.
Charles Stark appeared by telephone for Hugh Foley (Successor Trustee).

The Court stated that the objection is on the basis of venue and looks like it is well taken, and that proper venue appears to be Sonoma County. Mr. Reid stated that he provided a list of statutes, that 17400 allows a Court to retain jurisdiction, and that there are Court records that would be required for past probate matters and wills that are lodged in San Francisco for the purpose of additional litigation if litigation is necessary. The Court stated that 17400 is a jurisdictional statute not a venue statute, that this is not a consideration of venue, and that records are available and can be respectively dealt with by what ever Court has venue. Options on how to proceed were discussed. Mr. Reid agrees that dismissing this petition here subject to refiling in Sonoma County or the proper County seems to be the easiest way to proceed. The Petition to Compel Trust Documents is dismissed without prejudice to refiling in the appropriate venue. Mr. Stark is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trust Documents
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Continued To Jul-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
